channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Singapore’s Singtel partners with Nvidia to build a research lab for companies that care about data sovereignty
item.description: Singtel is leaning into its AI and data center business as its mobile services business faces more competition.

item.title: Scientists are pushing back on warnings that microplastics damage your health, saying people are just obese and calling some studies ‘a joke’
item.description: Some scientists are saying previous studies warning of the damage microplastics may cause are exaggerated and are false positives triggered by human f...

item.title: Surprising New Trend Of Agentic AI ‘Renting Humans’ To Perform Tasks That The AI Wants Done On Its Behalf
item.description: Agentic AI is renting humans. Yes, AI reaches out to find humans that will perform tasks on behalf of the AI. It's a new trend. An AI Insider scoop.

item.title: The Last Brushstroke: How AI Is Expanding The World Of Art
item.description: How an AI generated painting sold for half a million dollars — and what it means for the future of art, creativity and business.

item.title: Sam Altman gets defensive about AI’s massive electricity usage: ‘It also takes a lot of energy to train a human’
item.description: Altman said data centers have moved past water-intensive cooling, but 56% globally still use evaporative systems.

item.title: ‘Panzer Dragoon Zwei: Remake’ Gets A New Demo On Steam
item.description: After playing the game at last year’s Tokyo Game Show, I was actually quite impressed with the 'Panzer Dragoon Zwei: Remake', and now there’s a demo o...

item.title: Yoko Taro To Create The Scenario For A New ‘Evangelion’ Anime Series
item.description: As part of the 30th anniversary celebration for 'Evangelion', a new anime series was announced with Yoko Taro in charge of the script and scenario.

item.title: FedEx sues Trump administration for full tariff refunds after Supreme Court ruling on IEEPA
item.description: FedEx sues U.S. government for tariff refunds after Supreme Court ruled Trump's emergency trade duties on imports were unlawful.

item.title: Olympic runner, Mo Farah has a message for struggling Gen Z: ‘I was a child trafficked, but I never gave up on myself’
item.description: From human trafficking survivor to Olympic champion, Mo Farah has a message for Gen Z: life will knock you down, but your success is your responsibili...

item.title: Qobuz Connect Gives Older Cambridge Audio Speakers A Boost
item.description: Cambridge Audio adds Qobuz Connect to older StreamMagic hardware. Stream 24-bit high-res audio to your favorite legacy devices.

item.title: Discord cuts ties with Peter Thiel-backed verification software after its code was found tied to U.S. surveillance efforts
item.description: Discord cut ties with its age-verification partner after exposed code fueled federal-reporting concerns, months after a breach hit 70,000 users.

item.title: What airlines, hotels and Airbnb actually owe travelers stranded in Mexico
Florida Chamber CEO says high-tax states are in a ‘death spiral’ as $4M-an-hour wealth migration accelerates
item.description: If Florida was a stock, the state's Chamber of Commerce CEO Mark Wilson "would be investing everything" in it as he details the Sunshine State's plans...

item.title: American homebuyers gain most purchasing power since 2022
item.description: Homebuyers' purchasing power rose over $30,300 in past year as median-income households can now afford $331,483 homes with mortgage payments 8.4% lowe...

item.title: Trump Organization signs deal for billion-dollar skyscraper on Australia's Gold Coast
item.description: The Trump Organization announced a $1 billion project in Australia last week, building a 91-floor luxury resort and apartments on the Gold Coast.

item.title: Did a blog post cause software stocks to lose more than $200B in market cap?
PayPal shares pop on takeover hopes. Here’s who could swoop in with a purchase.
Where Trump’s affordability ideas stand ahead of his State of the Union
Dow drops over 800 points, stocks close sharply lower on tariff tumult, AI fears
How should businesses approach tariff refunds?
item.description: Trade experts note that businesses seeking tariff refunds may need to appeal to CBP or the Court of International Trade to get their money back after ...

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
